highlights.text: I wrote on Thursday at 4pm that: “Bear case Tomorrow: Begins below 6782.” Friday morning, we lost it, and down we went.
What it does is it goes elevator down in a vertical in a vertical flush cutting through every support.
This is my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
I warned last Thursday at 4pm: “Watch for the Failed Breakdown of Tuesday’s 6718 daily low.” On Friday ES flushed last Tuesday’s 6718 low by a few points, recovered, and ripped.
Bulls couldn’t recover it initially, and we went elevator down off the futures open last night due to more bearish weekly headlines, selling down to 6588.
As always though, every elevator down sell in ES resolves in a squeeze, and last night was no different.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow.

post_title: Bulls Bought The Dip With Force. Dead Cat Bounce, or Bottom? March 10th Plan
